name: Sesame Halvah
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast 6 cups of sesame seeds in a skillet or oven until golden brown.
2. Blend the toasted sesame seeds one cup at a time in a blender, adding honey, ginger, cinnamon, and allspice. Mix well after each addition.
3. Press the mixture into a greased 13-inch by 9-inch pan.
4. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour to set.
5. Cut into squares and serve.
